brief_summary_anonymized: Ministry of commerce wants commerce-awareness campaign — bored audience expects dry institutional content.
strategic_insight: You don't need to teach Saudis about commerce. Commerce is in their blood. The Ministry honors a national DNA, not governs an industry.
execution_summary: Generation-to-generation narrative. Trade as origin, not career choice. Near-arrogant Saudi pride: 'You don't need to tell us to trade. You need to remind us of what we already know.'
what_made_it_work: Reframing institutional brief as cultural-pride brief unlocks engagement
Multi-generational narrative carries Saudi cultural weight
Near-arrogant voice signals confidence audiences trust
what_would_NOT_transplant: Only works for ministries with actual cultural-DNA story
Risks reading as boastful — requires restraint in execution
